--- Round 2 ---
<think>Good, I found the transactional financial assets value for DOC1 (Zhejiang Dunan Artificial Environment Co., Ltd.):

The instruction says "请你阅读以上多个公司的财务报表，仅根据上述看到的内容回答以下问题" - I need to read multiple company financial reports. But I'm only processing DOC1 right now. The system will call me for DOC2 and DOC3 separately.
